steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to compare the lengths of the two rivers. This is the decisive criterion for evaluating the choices.

steps.title: Select the choice that accomplishes the goal
steps.content:
B directly compares the two rivers' lengths by stating one is shorter than the other, using the data provided.

The other three either use irrelevant dimensions (A compares locations, D compares rankings) or provide incomplete information (C mentions only one river's length).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
